text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hiya! I'm Agnes Digital, the<n>all-rounder-ish
Umamusume who'll<n>run on dirt or turf just to be
side-by-side with all my oshis! ☆

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It's finally time for me to make my<n>debut, and the
news has somehow<n>made its way to T.M. Opera O
and<n>Meisho Doto!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Why are they worrying about me?!<n>Ooohhh, I'm
not so sure about this<n>race anymore!
